name: Xcelon
description: Six-channel true stereo mixer with dual-mono crossfade, dual FX sends and returns, selectable A/B mix busses, VU metering and expansion ports.

controls.name: Channel 1-6 GAIN
controls.description: Boosts each stereo channel or line source before the mix stage.

controls.name: Channel 1-6 BAL
controls.description: Pans a stereo pair or balances a dual-mono pair with a pan-law curve.

controls.name: Channel 1-6 XFADE
controls.description: Engages dual-mono crossfade mode for the channel pair.

controls.name: Channel 1-6 VOL
controls.description: Sets channel level with a long-travel fader and LED response.

controls.name: Channel 1-6 FX1
controls.description: Sets send level to the first stereo FX bus.

controls.name: Channel 1-6 FX2
controls.description: Sets send level to the second stereo FX bus.

controls.name: Channel 1-6 AB
controls.description: Assigns the channel to mix bus A, mix bus B or both.

controls.name: FX RETURN 1 LEVEL
controls.description: Controls the first stereo return path into the mixer.

controls.name: FX RETURN 2 LEVEL
controls.description: Controls the second stereo return path into the mixer.

controls.name: FX RETURN AB
controls.description: Assigns the return to mix bus A, mix bus B or both.

inputs.name: INPUT 1-6 L/R
inputs.description: Six stereo or dual-mono channel input pairs with normalled right jacks.

inputs.name: BAL CV 1-6
inputs.description: Per-channel balance or crossfade control voltages.

behaviors.name: Stereo or dual-mono channels
behaviors.trigger: patch one or two sources into a channel pair
behaviors.description: A mono source in the left jack is normalled to the right jack, and the XFADE button turns the pair into a mono crossfader.

behaviors.name: A/B bus assignment
behaviors.description: Each channel can be routed to mix bus A, mix bus B or both, which makes bus splits and parallel processing simple.

behaviors.name: Pre/post send shaping
behaviors.description: The two send knobs feed shared stereo effects buses, with FX1 optionally configurable pre-fader by jumper.

behaviors.name: VCA style volume mode
behaviors.description: Volume CV can behave like a proper VCA instead of a summed modulation input.

behaviors.name: Clickless mute
behaviors.description: The mute circuit uses a VCA-based switch so changes do not click or pop.

behaviors.name: VU metering
behaviors.description: Each channel has a 5-segment VU meter that responds to the stereo signal level.

behaviors.name: Line and modular gain staging
behaviors.description: The preamp gain can bring modular signals up to line level or add a little push for saturated mix buses.

behaviors.name: Expandable mix architecture
behaviors.description: The rear ports support direct outputs and channel expanders for larger rigs.

patchIdeas.name: Stereo drum desk
patchIdeas.patch: kick and snare on channel 1 and 2 · hats on 3 · percussion on 4 · bus A goes dry · bus B gets reverb return · the mixer keeps the kit wide without sacrificing level control.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Xcelon:
* Ch 1: drum 1
* Ch 2: drum 2
* Ch 3: drum 3
* Ch 4: drum 4

Drum 1:
Drum 2:
Drum 3:
Drum 4:
Reverb:
Output:

- Drum 1 (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 1 L)
- Drum 2 (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 2 L)
- Drum 3 (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 3 L)
- Drum 4 (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 4 L)
- Xcelon (FX SEND 1 L) -> Reverb (In)
- Xcelon (FX SEND 1 R) -> Reverb (In)
- Reverb (Out L) -> Xcelon (FX RETURN 1 L)
- Reverb (Out R) -> Xcelon (FX RETURN 1 R)
- Xcelon (MIX OUT A L) -> Output (L)
- Xcelon (MIX OUT A R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Wet send rack
patchIdeas.patch: synth voice into channel 5 · FX1 to delay · FX2 to reverb · channel stays dry on bus A while bus B collects the wet returns for performance mixing.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Xcelon:
* Ch 5: dry voice
* FX1: delay send
* FX2: reverb send

VCO:
Delay:
Reverb:
Output:

- VCO (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 5 L)
- Xcelon (FX SEND 1 L) -> Delay (In)
- Xcelon (FX SEND 2 L) -> Reverb (In)
- Delay (Out L) -> Xcelon (FX RETURN 1 L)
- Delay (Out R) -> Xcelon (FX RETURN 1 R)
- Reverb (Out L) -> Xcelon (FX RETURN 2 L)
- Reverb (Out R) -> Xcelon (FX RETURN 2 R)
- Xcelon (MIX OUT A L) -> Output (L)
- Xcelon (MIX OUT A R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Dual-mono crossfade
patchIdeas.patch: two mono voices share one channel in XFADE mode · BAL acts as a crossfader instead of a pan knob · ideal for swapping between two basses or two drum layers on one fader.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Xcelon:
* Ch 2: XFADE on
* Ch 2: dual mono pair

VCO A:
VCO B:
Output:

- VCO A (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 2 L)
- VCO B (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 2 R)
- Xcelon (MIX OUT A L) -> Output (L)
- Xcelon (MIX OUT A R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Performance bus split
patchIdeas.patch: channels 1-3 feed mix A while 4-6 feed mix B · both buses stay available for external processing or cue monitoring · AB switches let the split move live without repatching.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Xcelon:
* Ch 1-3: bus A
* Ch 4-6: bus B

VCO 1:
VCO 2:
VCO 3:
VCO 4:
VCO 5:
VCO 6:
Output:

- VCO 1 (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 1 L)
- VCO 2 (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 2 L)
- VCO 3 (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 3 L)
- VCO 4 (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 4 L)
- VCO 5 (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 5 L)
- VCO 6 (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 6 L)
- Xcelon (MIX OUT A L) -> Output (A L)
- Xcelon (MIX OUT A R) -> Output (A R)
- Xcelon (MIX OUT B L) -> Output (B L)
- Xcelon (MIX OUT B R) -> Output (B R)

patchIdeas.name: CV-controlled blend desk
patchIdeas.patch: use VOL CV on a few channels like VCAs · pan with BAL CV from an envelope follower or slow LFO · Xcelon becomes a playable modulation surface rather than a static submixer.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Xcelon:
* Ch 1: VOL CV on
* Ch 2: BAL CV on

Envelope:
LFO:
VCO:
Output:

- Envelope (Out) >> Xcelon (VOL CV 1)
- LFO (Out) >> Xcelon (BAL CV 2)
- VCO (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 1 L)
- VCO (Out) -> Xcelon (INPUT 2 L)
- Xcelon (MIX OUT A L) -> Output (L)
- Xcelon (MIX OUT A R) -> Output (R)
